name: @tootallnate/usm
description: Parser for CRI Sofdec2 USM video container files. Walks the chunked structure (CRID / @SFV / @SFA / @SBT / @CUE), decodes the embedded @UTF metadata tables, and exposes per-stream codec info plus payload Blobs ready to hand off to a video / audio decoder. Supports VP9, H.264, ADX, HCA, and uncompressed PCM streams.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
